patient.query: Yeah, I get that it makes sense to feel that way, but it’s still really tough. Sometimes, I just freeze up, and then I regret not saying anything at all. I guess I just worry people won’t understand where I’m coming from. It’s hard to think about what I really want to say when I’m so caught up in my fears.

automatic_thoughts: regret not saying anything
people won’t understand me
hard to think clearly

It’s like I want to escape the moment before it even starts.

messing up
not being interesting enough
